# 按钮 Button

> 来源：https://c2.yonyoucloud.com/iuap-yonbuilder-designer/ucf-wh/docs-mdf/mdf/index.html#/components-mobile/02-button | 所属：移动组件

# [](#按钮-button)按钮 Button

## [](#1-功能说明)1. 功能说明

标记了一个操作命令，通过点击按钮，响应点击行为，触发相应的业务逻辑。

## [](#2-效果展示)2. 效果展示

### [](#21-按钮尺寸)2.1. 按钮尺寸

![](https://design.yonyoucloud.com/static/ucf/iuap-yonbuilder-designer.docs-mdf-fe/20250116-135007/mdf/static/Buttonanniu_image1.01fdb6d0.png) 
【大按钮（large）】

       
![](https://design.yonyoucloud.com/static/ucf/iuap-yonbuilder-designer.docs-mdf-fe/20250116-135007/mdf/static/Buttonanniu_image2.8d2ba3f0.png) 
【中按钮（middle）】
       
![](https://design.yonyoucloud.com/static/ucf/iuap-yonbuilder-designer.docs-mdf-fe/20250116-135007/mdf/static/Buttonanniu_image3.cb8d23b9.png)
                                                         
【小按钮（small）】

**底部区域按钮默认为大按钮**

## [](#3-按钮类型)3. 按钮类型

||默认显示按钮||default||primary||warning||ghost||text|
||![](https://design.yonyoucloud.com/static/ucf/iuap-yonbuilder-designer.docs-mdf-fe/20250116-135007/mdf/static/Buttonanniu_image4.a65307da.png)||![](https://design.yonyoucloud.com/static/ucf/iuap-yonbuilder-designer.docs-mdf-fe/20250116-135007/mdf/static/Buttonanniu_image4.a65307da.png) ![](https://design.yonyoucloud.com/static/ucf/iuap-yonbuilder-designer.docs-mdf-fe/20250116-135007/mdf/static/Buttonanniu_image5.7ac258f9.png)![](data:image/png;base64,)![](data:image/png;base64,)![](data:image/png;base64,)|||||||||

## [](#4-基本属性)4. 基本属性

||属性名称||属性含义||值类型||默认值||属性说明|
||属性名称||属性含义||值类型||默认值||属性说明|
||icon||按钮的图标类型||string||||图标的标签|
||disabeld||是否禁用||boolean||||true-禁用 false -非禁用|
||iStyle||按钮显示方式||number||||0图标加文字，1纯文字，2纯图标|
||cStyle||扩展属性||string||||所有的扩展属性都配在这个属性中|
||size||按钮大小-cextprops配置||string||large||'large'｜'middle'|
||mode||按钮类型-cextprops配置||string||''||'default'｜'primary'｜'warning'｜'ghost'｜'text'|

## [](#5-扩展属性cstyle)5. 扩展属性cStyle

暂无

## [](#6-loading状态)6. loading状态

![](https://design.yonyoucloud.com/static/ucf/iuap-yonbuilder-designer.docs-mdf-fe/20250116-135007/mdf/static/Buttonanniu_image9.dbcbffb8.png)

## [](#7-扩展脚本配置)7. 扩展脚本配置

//开启loading状态

viewmodel.get('按钮的itemName').doPropertyChange('setState',{loading:true})

//关闭loading状态

viewmodel.get('按钮的itemName').doPropertyChange('setState',{loading:false})

## [](#8-配置按钮组)8. 配置按钮组

功能介绍： 点击按钮 弹出按钮列表弹框

效果

![](https://design.yonyoucloud.com/static/ucf/iuap-yonbuilder-designer.docs-mdf-fe/20250116-135007/mdf/static/Buttonanniu_image10.bb4184ad.png)

预制一个按钮 cParameter里加个useBtnModal: true 这个按钮相当于一个分组
里面再放子按钮

![](https://design.yonyoucloud.com/static/ucf/iuap-yonbuilder-designer.docs-mdf-fe/20250116-135007/mdf/static/Buttonanniu_image11.f319bed0.png)

若有收获，就点个赞吧
